name: cargo
description: The Rust package manager and build tool

name: -q
--quiet
options.description: Do not print cargo log messages

name: --color
options.description: Control when colored output is used

name: -r
--release
options.description: Build in release mode with optimizations

name: --workspace
options.description: Build all packages in the workspace

subcommands.name: run
subcommands.description: Run a binary of the local package

name: -r
--release
options.description: Run in release mode with optimizations

name: --workspace
options.description: Test all packages in the workspace

name: --no-run
options.description: Compile the tests without running them

subcommands.name: check
subcommands.description: Check the package for errors without building it

subcommands.name: fmt
subcommands.description: Format all source files with rustfmt

subcommands.name: publish
subcommands.description: Upload the package to the registry
